mapper.select: SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, REPLACE(board_type, 'COMMUNITY_', '') AS category, title, rqst_id AS author, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date, COALESCE(views, 0) AS views FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'COMMUNITY_%' ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'MM.DD') AS date FROM board WHERE board_type IN ('COMMUNITY_GROUP_MANAGER', 'COMMUNITY_FACILITIES_CALENDAR') ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, REPLACE(board_type, 'COMMUNITY_', '') AS category, title, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'MM.DD') AS date FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'COMMUNITY_%' ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rqst_id) FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'COMMUNITY_%' AND rqst_id IS NOT NULL AND rqst_id != ''
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'COMMUNITY_%'
